concerns.text: Phase 1 validation benchmark focuses on crossing number ≤ 10, but research question targets ≤ 13 crossings. Plan does not specify how exploratory 11-13 crossing data will be integrated into final conclusions or whether conclusions will be limited to validated subset.

Filtering to hyperbolic knots (volume > 0) changes scope from 'prime knots' to 'hyperbolic prime knots'. Plan acknowledges this but does not specify how final conclusions will be qualified given this selection bias.

Plan specifies VIF will be high due to mathematical constraint (braid index ≤ crossing number) but does not specify how model coefficients will be interpreted given known multicollinearity beyond noting 'descriptive associations'.

Residual analysis identifies knot families deviating ≥ 2 standard deviations from fitted trend, but plan does not specify how structural properties (e.g., alternating classification effects) will be distinguished from 'unexplained variance' in interpretation.

FR-013 requires ≥90% match against KnotInfo, but plan acknowledges databases may share underlying sources. Plan should specify how consistency check results will be qualified in final validation claims.
